headline: US cyclospora outbreak linked to lettuce, fresh produce
summary: Health experts have linked a recent US outbreak of the cyclospora parasite to fresh produce, such as lettuce. Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman is joined by Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley and Business Insider Today executive editor Dan DeFrancesco to talk further about the source of this outbreak in US crops and how fast-food companies are reacting to this.
